summary: THE MPI-191 fix, carded ready-for-design-review: volume-pod hot-store — stage >=~15GB weight files to container disk, sticky per pod lifetime, LRU on real pressure only, volume stays durable library. Threshold not model-name (Q8 22GB paid same tax). Disk 50->80GB. Wrapper-owned, ships via publish-runtime. Full requirements + evidence + open questions in plan.md.
